title: taraxacum subglebulosum
intro: Taraxacum subglebulosum, also known as lesser hawk's beard or lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This perennial plant is native to Europe and Western Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subglebulosum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Taraxacum subglebulosum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible for use in various forms.
